description: Semantic grouping of telecom slots. A group is the unit of CASCADE detection: a CASCADE requires >=3 slots from the SAME semantic group changing due to one root event (serves C2). Every slot in telecom_slots.json belongs to exactly one group. All six groups hold 3 slots, so all six are CASCADE-eligible.
cascade_eligibility_note: CASCADE requires >=3 slots in the same group changing together. Every telecom group has exactly 3 slots, so all six are CASCADE-eligible. Example: changing plan_name typically cascades plan_price and data_allowance (plan_spec).
